creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission.  Please make sure to set "maintainer-approval" to have your patches looked at.

As for your patch:

 - please prefer DISTVERSION over PORTVERSION if possible
 - PORTDOCS=* should be avoided as it circumvents the point of having a pack
   list in the first place.  Unless it's very inconvenient, try to list all
   documentation explicitly.

Rest of the patch looks ok and can likely be committed once you fix these two issues and set maintainer-approval.
